##NAMES=Gordonite
##RRUFFID=R130671
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=MgAl_2_(PO_4_)_2_(OH)_2_·8H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Near Milgun Station, Meekatharra Shire, Western Australia, Australia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Vitreous clear prismatic lathlike bundles of triclinic crystals. Associated with montgomeryite (R140625), collinsite (R140626), and hydroxylapatite (R140987).
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130671
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 5.242 b: 10.464 c: 6.965 alpha: 107.76 beta: 111.46 gamma: 71.86 volume: 329.87 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
